document.name: Aszu Étterem
document.shortDescription: Fine dining at the foot of Andrássy út — Hungarian wine pairings and contemporary plates near Oktogon.
document.longDescription:
Aszu Étterem on Andrássy út 2 pairs a deep Hungarian wine list with refined seasonal cooking steps from Heroes' Square. The dining rooms suit business dinners and weekend tasting menus. Reserve via aszuetterem.hu.

Sources: https://www.aszuetterem.hu/
